## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added (via `towncrier` fragment in `changelog/`)
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
